privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1_text: This privacy policy is drawn up in accordance with the requirements of Federal Law No. 152-FZ of 27.07.2006 «On Personal Data» and defines the procedure for processing personal data submitted via the contact form on whostolemysleep.ru.
privacy.s2_text: The controller is an individual — the owner of whostolemysleep.ru. Contact address: whostolemysleep{'@'}gmail.com.
privacy.s3_text: The following data is processed: name (display name entered by the user) and email address. This data is submitted exclusively through the contact form.
privacy.s4_text: Data is used solely to respond to user inquiries. Data is not shared with third parties and is not used for newsletters or advertising.
privacy.s5_text: Data is stored in a secured database (Neon PostgreSQL). Only the controller has access to the data. Data is retained for no more than 1 year from the date of the inquiry.
privacy.s6_text: You have the right to request clarification, blocking, or deletion of your data by contacting whostolemysleep{'@'}gmail.com. Requests will be processed within 30 days.
privacy.s7_text: By submitting the form, you confirm that you have read this policy and consent to the processing of your personal data for the stated purposes.
